page.title: Cloud Git
page.desc: Choose a provider below. Each tab scopes the layout and accent to that host—PRs and CI views will follow the same pattern. Tokens are stored locally for HTTPS Git on the Git VCS page.
provider.connectedAt: Linked {{date}} · token stored locally for Git over HTTPS
provider.githubConnectDesc: Sign in with device flow (browser) or paste a personal access token. Credentials stay on this machine and power HTTPS remotes on the Git VCS page.
provider.gitlabConnectDesc: Paste a personal access token from GitLab (Preferences → Access Tokens, or the same path on your self-managed instance). Include the api scope so merge requests and API actions work. Credentials stay on this machine and power HTTPS remotes on the Git VCS page.
provider.switchToPat: Use a personal access token instead
host.label: Git host
oauth.title: Connecting to {{label}}
oauth.deviceInstructions: On {{label}}, approve the app and enter this user code if prompted. Keep this page open until it shows connected — Lumina polls in the background. If the browser step succeeds but this screen never finishes, the OAuth Client ID is usually wrong: set your own under Advanced (or use a personal access token on this tab).
oauth.browserFallback: Could not open the browser automatically. Open {{uri}} manually and paste the code above.
oauth.expired: Code expired — click Connect to try again.
oauth.denied: Authorization was denied on the provider side.
oauth.saved: Saved. Use Connect on the {{label}} tab again to start device flow with this client ID.
scopes.gitlabApiNote: Ensure the 'api' scope is enabled to create and manage Merge Requests.
advanced.title: Advanced: GitHub OAuth client ID (device flow)
advanced.desc: Public OAuth application client ID from GitHub developer settings. Stored locally in store.json. Used only for GitHub browser device flow when the build does not embed a default client ID.
account.title: Account & security
activity.title: Activity
activity.desc: PRs/MRs, reviews requested of you, assigned issues, CI, and latest releases for <1>{{label}}</1> (account-scoped). When a row's repo basename matches a recent local folder, use <3>Open in Lumina VCS</3> to jump to Git VCS; otherwise open in the browser.
activity.emptyPrs: No open PRs/MRs found for your account.
activity.emptyReviews: No open PRs/MRs with a pending review request for your account.
activity.emptyCi: No recent pipelines found for your account.
activity.emptyReleases: No recent releases found across your repos.
